{{Infobox character
| name = Luminous Queen Sha Leiala
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
| name = Luminous Queen Sha Leiala
| aliases = Leiala, Sha Leiala
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Luminous Queen, Monarch
| abilities = Path of Celestial Radiance
| affiliations = Ninecloud Court
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Luminous Queen Sha Leiala Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Leiala is the former [[Luminous Queen]] of the [[Ninecloud Court]], a nation and continent named after her family's nine-colored cloud sigil. For two centuries, she ruled the [[Ninecloud]] people using the Sha bloodline's unique [[royal madra]], a spiritual mutation that allows for the perfected control of other spirits. Her reign ended prematurely following a battle against powerful plague-spirits from a disaster zone, which left her lifeline damaged and forced an early transfer of her inheritance. To prevent instability and potential coups from rebellious elements, the [[Sha family]] has maintained a deception regarding her passing. Through illusions, she continues to appear throughout the nation, giving the public the impression that she remains a healthy and powerful ruler.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|As a [[Monarch]] associated with the [[Ninecloud Court]], Sha Leiala ruled over the [[Ninecloud]] people for two hundred years. She is the mother of Sha Miara and holds the title of [[Luminous Queen]]. During her reign, she utilized her power to restrain guests within the [[Ninecloud Court]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Court]] restrains guests by the power of [[Luminous Queen Sha Leiala]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Leiala is the [[Luminous Queen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Leiala is the mother of Sha Miara.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Leiala ruled over the [[Ninecloud]] people for two hundred years.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sha Leiala is a [[Monarch]] associated with the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Luminous Queen]] Sha Leiala is the ruler of the [[Ninecloud Court]] and manifests as a presence composed of multicolored light. A practitioner of the [[Path of Celestial Radiance]], she has not made an open appearance for several years. Her lineage includes Sha Miara, who is her direct descendant. Additionally, she held a deep hatred for [[Reigan Shen]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Leiala is the [[Luminous Queen]] of the [[Ninecloud Court]] and appears as a presence of multicolored light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Luminous Queen Sha Leiala]] follows the [[Path of Celestial Radiance]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Leiala hasn't shown herself openly in years.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sha Miara is a direct descendant of Sha Leiala.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Leiala hated [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“By the power of Luminous Queen Sha Leiala, we have restrained you.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“By the power of Luminous Queen Sha Leiala, we have restrained you.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Luminous Queen Sha Leiala,” a woman’s voice said. “Path of Celestial Radiance.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
